history.content: Startup snapshot is partially limited right now since both `task_control` and `schedule` are unavailable, so I can’t confirm current active tasks or upcoming scheduled runs from live systems. The key carry-forward note is that last run’s weekly review method worked best by combining `schedule_job` and `task_control` telemetry, with a known issue around inconsistent running vs. paused metadata that should be explicitly flagged next time. Where things left off: continue the weekly self-improvement review workflow using that combined-signal approach, while treating status mismatches as a first-class reporting item.
